details.query: I'm a developer and I want to build an agent. Which workshop track should I take?
As a software engineer whose goal is to build an agent, which track fits best?
I'm a developer and I want to build an agent from scratch. Recommend a track.
I'm an architect focused on integrating an agent into Teams. Recommend a track.
Solution architect here, my goal is to integrate an agent. Which workshop track?
I'm a developer but my goal is to integrate an agent into an app. Which track?
Executive whose goal is to integrate an agent. Which track should I attend?
I'm a business leader who needs to govern and operate agents. Which track?
As a manager, my goal is to govern agents across the org. Which track fits?
Architect wanting to govern and operate agents — which workshop track?
I'm a business leader and I want to build an agent. Which track?
Engineer whose goal is to govern agents. Which track should I pick?
